nodes.title: Prompt Line Pick — usage
widgets_values:
Put one item per line. The **seed + node ID** determines which line is picked — `sha256(seed:nodeId) % lineCount`.

Key feature: **each instance picks independently even with the same seed**, because the node ID acts as a channel discriminator. No need to manage different seeds per list.

Tip: connect the seed input to your KSampler seed for reproducible prompt/image pairs.

nodes.title: Subject
widgets_values:
a red panda on a rooftop
a golden retriever on the beach
a fox in a winter forest
a cat watching the rain
an owl perched at dusk

nodes.title: Style
widgets_values:
cinematic photography
digital painting
watercolor illustration
oil on canvas
dark fantasy concept art

nodes.title: Result
widgets_values:
Both nodes use seed=42 but pick **different lines** because their node IDs differ.

Connect STRING outputs to CLIPTextEncode or concatenate them with a String Concat node.

groups.title: Independent pickers — same seed, different lines
